items.title: Iraqi lawyers decline custody removal cases in Baghdad

items.title: Erbil attack injures six Kurdistan Freedom Party members
items.desc: Shafaq News- Erbil An attack on the Erbil headquarters of the Kurdistan Freedom Party (PAK), an Iranian Kurdish opposition group based in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq, injured six of the party's members on Wednesday. items.title: Funding shortfall deepens cancer drug shortage in Nineveh
items.desc: Shafaq News- Mosul A shortage of cancer medicines has disrupted treatment in Iraq's Nineveh province after import delays and a sharp drop in government funding, the province's health director said on Wednesday. items.desc: Shafaq News- Al-Hasakah The Alouk water station in Syria’s Ras al-Ayn (Sari Kani) countryside in northern Hasakah province resumed operations on Wednesday after being out of service since late 2019, following nine months of maintenance and rehabilitation work carried out with government efforts and support from international organizations.
